heading: The Shardstone Core.
intro:
We are an independent publisher of storytelling games and fantastical worlds designed to push the boundaries of imagination.

**Quality.** Every product we put out, be it digital or physical, will be high in quality and something you can be proud of having.

**Story.** When designing our games, we always ensure to create tools that craft exciting and fresh stories.

**Diversity.** Our products are for everyone, and representation can be found both in our creative team and in our games.
